heroSection.title: Invest in Saudi Real Estate
heroSection.subtitle: from 100 SAR Only
heroSection.description: Start your investment journey in Saudi real estate easily and safely. Invest in real properties through CapNest platform regulated by the Capital Market Authority (REGA). From owning zero assets to owning assets in under 3 minutes (120 seconds).

howItWorksSection.title: How Investing Works
howItWorksSection.subtitle: Start building your real estate portfolio in three simple steps. No complexity, no hassle.
howItWorksSection.step1Description: Create your free account and fill in your basic details to join the waiting list.
howItWorksSection.step2Description: Browse the first available property through Digishares and choose your investment share.
howItWorksSection.step3Description: Invest and start earning monthly returns from your real estate investments.
